episodes.title: Mormon Church Exposed: The Whole Truth

Heidi Luv has been in the Mormon (Latter Day Saints) church since she was born. It took her 35+ years to realize it's a cult and now Heidi shares her knowledge, experience and investigations bringing the truth about Mormon church.
Heidi is a wife, a mother, a grandmother and a woman of God.
